skills.name: question-answering
skills.description:
Provides intelligent question answering capabilities for general knowledge queries.
Use when users ask factual questions, need explanations, or require information retrieval.
examples: Why do we see different phases of the moon?
Explain quantum computing in simple terms
What's the difference between RNA and DNA?

skills.name: pdf-processing
skills.description:
Extract text, fill forms, and extract tables from PDF documents.
Handles both standard text-based PDFs and scanned documents with OCR.
examples: Extract text from this PDF document
Fill out this PDF form with the provided data
Extract tables from this invoice PDF
Get text from this scanned document
Parse form fields from this PDF
